### 2014440
**Gumball S03E12 - The Void**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 11:26

seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2014440` mediaid=`cb61c46e82c3534ae09b9969a5727ed20676cf36`  
_When Gumball and Darwin investigate a missing classmate, they discover a far greater mystery . . . about Elmore. Gumball and Darwin start noticing small details around Elmore High that don't add up. They come to the conclusion that Molly has disappeared, even though nobody else remembers her ever having existed. Mr Small confirms their suspicions and tells them that things are not always what they seem in Elmore. They set off on a quest to rescue Molly in an alternate dimension, and soon need rescuing themselves!_

_Gumball and Darwin help Rocky land an office job so that his dad, Mr. Robinson, will be proud of him. After a health scare the kids decide to reunite Mr Robinson with his son. Mr Robinson has always seen Rocky as a disappointment so when Gumball and Darwin help him land a corporate job at Chanax, he is thrilled. However the Chanax corporation is not quite what it seems. Can Gumball and Darwin rescue Rocky before he becomes a corporate drone for all eternity . . ._

_Clayton is a compulsive liar, but Gumball discovers he wasn't lying about his awesome martial arts move. Gumball confronts Clayton about his fabled Seven Pressure Point Heart Exploding Technique, assuming it's another one of his outlandish claims. _Donut Cop shows Gumball and Darwin that the smallest misdemeanour can lead to a breakdown in law.  Gumball jaywalks and is pulled over by Donut Cop. When Gumball objects he is told that even the smallest misdemeanor can lead to a breakdown in law. In an effort to impress the kids Donut Cop takes them for a ride-along in his cop car and gets carried away, progressively breaking the law himself. He soon proves that the tiniest offense can indeed snowball into complete lawlessness!_

**Gumball S03E16 - The Allergy**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 11:26

seriesid=`835928` titleid=`2014444` mediaid=`bb9a70f99ddbe79acac352993f687fd84688b6aa`  
_Gumball needs to find a cure for Darwin's allergy before he sneezes Elmore off the map. Darwin starts sneezing repeatedly and it seems he can't stop. The Wattersons figure maybe he's allergic to something. After a few guesses, they come to the conclusion that he is allergic to stupidity. Being surrounded by stupid people, this is something of a problem. And they need to find a solution before Darwin's increasingly explosive sneezes destroy the town._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2014444_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
